raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (the thesis statement) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast, providing concrete rewrite recommendations.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs, demonstrating logical consistency.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), adhering to scope.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no regressions or introduction of new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (the thesis statement) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast, providing concrete rewrite recommendations.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs, demonstrating logical consistency.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), adhering to scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no regressions or introduction of new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating provenance and traceability.
